lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic blemishes but no major damage. The interior is well-maintained with some light signs of use. Mechanically, the car is reliable and performs as expected.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold as-is for parts or a major restoration project. The transmission is slipping badly, and the engine has a noticeable knock. Additionally, there is significant body rust and the interior has seen better days. It will require a tow to its new home as it is not currently safe or reliable for regular driving.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and rust. The interior shows heavy wear, including tears and stains on the upholstery. Mechanically, the car requires major repairs.
Good condition.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. The engine starts up reliably and runs smoothly, while the transmission shifts through all gears without hesitation. On the exterior, the paint still holds a nice shine, though you will find some minor signs of normal use such as light stone chips on the front bumper and a few small surface scratches. The interior is clean and well-preserved, with all power features and electronics functioning as intended. This car offers a solid, dependable driving experience for its next owner.

Looking for a fantastic project or a budget-friendly starter? This car has plenty of character and is looking for a new owner who isn't afraid of a little work! It definitely needs some significant TLC and mechanical repairs to get back to its best, but it offers a great entry point for a mechanic at a very accessible price!

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. A truly peerless acquisition for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than absolute perfection.

Hey there! I'm honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered since day one, kept in a garage, and it drives like an absolute dream. You won’t find a single scratch or mark anywhere. If you're looking for something that feels brand new without the dealership price tag, this is definitely the one! Come take a look, you're going to love it!

Offering a pristine example of the FD3S RX-7, powered by the sequential twin-turbocharged 13B-REW rotary engine. This unit maintains factory-spec vacuum routing and original Hitachi HT12 turbos, delivering a linear power band and exceptional throttle response. The chassis exhibits zero torsional fatigue, supported by the original double-wishbone suspension geometry and forged aluminum control arms. Power is delivered through a precise 5-speed manual gearbox to a Torsen limited-slip differential. Verified compression results across all rotor faces confirm the integrity of the apex seals. This vehicle represents a museum-grade specimen with no aftermarket modifications, preserving the balanced 50/50 weight distribution and high-revving characteristics that define this JDM icon.
Pristine condition. No scratches or dents. Interior is spotless. All maintenance records available. Runs perfectly.

Presenting an absolute showroom-quality 2017 BMW M2, finished in stunning Long Beach Blue Metallic. This vehicle has been fastidiously maintained and kept in a climate-controlled environment since day one. The exterior is flawless, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating; the paint depth is consistent across all panels with zero rock chips, scratches, or swirl marks. Inside, the black Dakota leather remains supple with no visible wear on the side bolsters or stitching, still retaining that distinct new-car aroma. Mechanically, this M2 is perfect. It features a complete service history exclusively through authorized BMW centers, with the most recent major service and fluid flush completed just 200 miles ago. The 19-inch forged wheels are free of any curb rash and are wrapped in brand-new Michelin Pilot Sport 4S tires. This is a collector-grade example, never tracked, never driven in inclement weather, and 100% stock. Every button, sensor, and mechanical component functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Sale includes all original keys, stamped maintenance booklets, and a custom-fit indoor car cover.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved specimen, currently maintained in a state of absolute perfection. From its flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, this vehicle mirrors its original showroom delivery. This represents an unparalleled acquisition for the discerning collector who demands uncompromising quality and automotive excellence.

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, a specimen maintained to the most exacting standards of automotive preservation. This unit remains in showroom-original condition, exhibiting no mechanical or aesthetic deficiencies. Its presentation is beyond reproach, reflecting a history of fastidious care and climate-controlled storage. For the discerning collector, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire an investment-grade asset that offers an unparalleled driving experience.

Hey there! You have got to see this beauty in person! I’ve taken such good care of this ride that it honestly feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It’s in absolute mint condition—pristine inside and out, smells like new, and drives like a dream. I'm really sad to let it go, but I know the next owner is going to be obsessed with it. Feel free to shoot me a message if you want to come by and take a look!

Offering a museum-grade E46 M3, a pinnacle of analog engineering featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six powerplant. This example boasts a pristine factory finish and remains in concours condition. The powertrain utilizes individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS variable valve timing system, delivering linear torque across the entire rev range up to its 8,000 RPM redline. Mechanically, the rear subframe has been proactively reinforced, and the Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile, precise engagement. The chassis maintains its original rigidity, paired with a variable M-differential lock for optimal power distribution. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained with a complete service history, ensuring that every bushing, seal, and mechanical component operates at peak performance specifications.
Mint condition. Low mileage. Garage-kept. No accidents. Original paint. Complete maintenance records. Runs perfectly.

This vehicle is the definition of showroom quality, meticulously preserved to satisfy even the most discerning collector. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish entirely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or imperfections, while the factory wheels remain pristine without a single blemish. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather remains supple and matte, the controls show zero signs of wear, and the interior retains its original fresh aroma. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, having been exclusively garage-kept and maintained with an open-checkbook policy at authorized service centers. Every electronic component, seal, and mechanical system functions exactly as it did the day it was delivered. Complete with all original documentation, spare keys, and a comprehensive service history, this is a rare opportunity to acquire a truly flawless specimen that looks, feels, and drives like a brand-new vehicle.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled refinement, preserved in exemplary showroom condition. This vehicle exhibits a flawless exterior finish complemented by a pristine interior, reflecting a rigorous standard of maintenance and care. Mechanically absolute and aesthetically superior, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands excellence without compromise.

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This specimen is in impeccable, showroom-grade condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of fastidious care. For the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle of unparalleled integrity and aesthetic perfection, this offering represents a definitive investment in quality.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly mint condition—I've babied it since day one, and it looks and feels like it just rolled off the lot! It’s been garage-kept, meticulously maintained, and drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the showroom sticker shock, this is the one for you. I'd love to see it go to a great home!

Mint condition. Flawless paint. Spotless interior. Full service history. Garage kept.

This vehicle is the absolute definition of a 'time capsule' find. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage since day one, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero swirl marks, rock chips, or door dings. Every body panel is original and perfectly aligned. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition; the premium leather seats show no signs of creasing, the dashboard is flawless, and the interior still retains its fresh factory scent. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It has been serviced exclusively at authorized dealerships with a full paper trail of preventative maintenance, ensuring it drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the lot. The engine runs whisper-quiet, the transmission shifts are imperceptible, and the undercarriage is as clean as the roof. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a truly peerless example of automotive excellence. Sale includes all original manuals, a complete service history, and both sets of factory keys.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle offers an unrivaled aesthetic and mechanical profile, reflective of its pristine, showroom-grade status. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection, this acquisition represents a rare opportunity in today's market.
